name: Strawberry-Kiwi Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together flour and salt in a bowl.
2. Cut in butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Mix together ice water and lemon juice separately.
4. Sprinkle half of the dry ingredients over the wet ingredients.
5. Toss with a fork until the dry ingredients are moistened.
6. Add more liquid as needed and mix until a dough forms.
7. Knead into a dough ball and flatten into a disk. Cover with plastic wrap.
8. Chill for 30 minutes.
9. Roll the dough out to an 11-inch circle and fit it into a 9-inch pie plate.
10. Fold the edges and flute.
11. Prick the bottom and sides with the tines of a fork.
12. Cover and chill for 10 minutes.
13. Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
14. Line the pastry with foil and weights.
15. Bake another 10 minutes or until golden brown.
16. Put 2 cups kiwifruit in a saucepan and mash with a potato masher.
17. Add sugar, cornstarch, and stir well.
18. Add water and stir until it boils.
19. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
20. Add butter and lemon juice. Stir until the butter melts.
21. Set aside.
22. Place the remaining 2 cups kiwifruit into the bottom of the pie crust.
23. Pour the mashed kiwi mixture over everything.
24. Smooth the edges.
25. Arrange strawberry slices over the top in a decorative pattern, pressing gently into the surface.
26. Chill for 3-4 hours.
